title: Why Vim Still Matters: Beyond Touch Typing in the AI Era
description: Discover why Vim remains an essential productivity tool in 2025, even with AI code generation. Learn how modal editing and muscle memory complement touch typing skills.
author: Muhammad Aus Hijri

title: Git Beyond Code: Version Control for Everything
description: Exploring Git's potential for non-code files like spreadsheets and Word documents, current limitations, and the future of universal version control.
author: Muhammad Aus Hijri
